evidence_summary: Alnylam Brasil Farmaceutica Ltda is a direct subsidiary of Alnylam Pharmaceuticals Inc. According to official SEC filings (Exhibit 21.1) from 2021, 2022, and 2024, Alnylam Pharmaceuticals Inc holds a 99% ownership interest in the Brazilian entity. The company also maintains a dedicated Brazilian website (alnylam.com.br) which lists the São Paulo office as 'Alnylam Brasil'.
